NAME: Divay Aggarwal
SUMMARY: Results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in \textbf{Linux-based systems} development using \textbf{C++} and \textbf{Python}. Proven experience in architecting scalable \textbf{Linux foundations} and mission-critical infrastructure. Proficient in \textbf{Systems Programming}, \textbf{Operating Systems}, and \textbf{Bash scripting} for automation. Skilled in \textbf{debugging} across OS layers, and maintaining code quality through \textbf{pytest}. Enthusiastic about leveraging \textbf{AI-assisted tools} for enhanced productivity and validation.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Spearheaded the system-level architecture of \textbf{"Redbooks"}, a mission-critical financial ledger platform facilitating automated accounting and auditing for over \textbf{\$5M+ in monthly transactions}.

Engineered complex \textbf{Python modules} to encapsulate "posting criteria logic," automating the generation of \textbf{AR/AP Invoices, Journal Entries, and Credit Memos} with strict \textbf{ACID compliance}.

Designed resilient \textbf{ETL pipelines} using \textbf{Python automation tools} to synchronize \textbf{50,000+ daily records} from mid-office servers to the Redbooks, ensuring 99.9\% data consistency.
Optimized \textbf{PostgreSQL} performance via compound indexing and query refactoring, reducing average query execution time by \textbf{35\%} during peak loads.
Championed \textbf{Test-Driven Development (TDD)} by implementing comprehensive \textbf{pytest} test suites, achieving \textbf{90\% code coverage} and significantly reducing production bugs.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Architected a \textbf{Smart Budget Management System} for \textbf{Linux platforms}, devising a custom \textbf{Weighted Moving Average (WMA)} forecasting formula to predict expected billing with \textbf{92\% accuracy}.
Engineered granular \textbf{Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)}, defining distinct dashboard views and permissions for \textbf{Super Admins, CEOs, and Managers} to oversee budget allotments.

Implemented \textbf{Smart Audit Logs} for compliance and integrated \textbf{automated email alerts} via \textbf{Python} to notify stakeholders of projected budget overruns, cutting excess spend by 15\%.
Designed interactive \textbf{financial visualizations} to display real-time spending trends, optimizing \textbf{data structure} aggregations to handle complex reporting data efficiently.

Integrated advanced \textbf{debugging tools} (GDB, Valgrind) for deep analysis, ensuring robust system stability and reliability across \textbf{Linux environments}.

Developed comprehensive \textbf{pytest} suites and \textbf{C++} unit tests for critical system components, achieving \textbf{95\% code coverage} and improving system stability.
Utilized \textbf{Bash scripts} and \textbf{Docker} for CI/CD integration, automating build and testing workflows to accelerate development lifecycle by \textbf{15\%}.
